{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Lindon's fortress
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon's fortress]] has a wide blue cloud.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
